title: System and method for introducing a construct either on or around the surface of the heart
abstract: A system and method for evaluating, altering and/or creating an opening around the heart to receive a construct. Using a minimally invasive techniques, a first guide is advanced into an area adjacent to the heart. The first guide is used to probe the area and determine if an opening can be safely formed in that area. The guide is then used to direct a larger guide catheter into the targeted area. The larger guide catheter is used to direct a more robust guide into the targeted area. The robust guide is then used to direct a delivery guide catheter into the targeted area. The delivery guide catheter can be used to stall. a device deployment guide. Either the delivery guide catheter or the device deployment guide can be used to advance the construct into the targeted area.
claims: 1. A method of positioning a construct into a targeted area near the heart, comprising: advancing a first flexible guide into said targeted area; guiding a first catheter over said first flexible guide into said targeted area; retracting said first flexible guide and using said first catheter to direct a second flexible guide into said targeted area, wherein said second flexible guide is stiffer than said first flexible guide; using said second flexible guide to direct a second catheter into said targeted area; using said second catheter to advance a third flexible guide into said targeted area; and utilizing said third flexible guide to advance said construct into said targeted area.
